title: Big Mom’s Broken Memory
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Caesar Clown, Unknown person #10, Brûlée, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as Big Mom’s past explains the emotional weakness that the assassination plan tries to exploit.
scene: Big Mom’s childhood reveals the loss and confusion behind her obsession with Mother Carmel.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Listen up! Because I can fly,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll bring the escape mirror into the hall!

dialogue.text: When you've finished your stuff, all of you,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A bit out of order, but here's my debut!

dialogue.text: Damn it! I can't believe she destroyed my launcher,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That monstrous old HAG! Yonkou will be yonkou, I guess!

dialogue.text: The pressure from her scream is ridiculous!

dialogue.text: We're on the roof up here! There's...

dialogue.text: Just get in- side for now,

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Tea Party storyline with 24 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s past reframes her weakness and the emotional core of the failed assassination plan.
